title: Cobblemon Optimised
description: Cobblemon Optimised is a carefully curated mod pack designed to offer a fresh take on the beloved world of Pokemon in Minecraft. With the new Cobblemon mod as its centrepiece, players can dive into a rich and immersive Pokemon experience.
body:
![Cobblemon Optimised logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3258d775c2d2d65b5e0db463720cbd77a43fcf9a_0.webp)

# Cobblemon Optimised Minecraft Modpack # 

![Discord link](https://discordapp.com/api/guilds/295013578396663818/widget.png?style=banner2)

💬 Join our Discord: https://discord.gg/lemoncloud

Step into a Pokémon journey built for performance, balance, and competitive fun.

Cobblemon Optimised isn’t just a modpack — it’s a refined experience designed to deliver smooth gameplay, fair progression, and an immersive world where your skill as a trainer truly matters.

Whether you're exploring, battling, or climbing the ranks… this is Cobblemon without the compromises.

## 🏞️ Adventure Meets Performance ## 
Explore a living world filled with Pokémon from across the generations — all running on a carefully tuned modpack built to feel fast, responsive, and stable.

Discover vibrant biomes packed with wild encounters
Catch, train, and evolve your perfect team
Take on Gyms, challenges, and server events
Progress through a balanced and rewarding journey

Every feature has been selected to enhance gameplay — not slow it down.

## ⚡ Optimised for the Best Experience ## 
Cobblemon Optimised is built to run beautifully on a wide range of systems while maintaining stunning visuals and smooth gameplay.

Higher FPS
Reduced lag & stutter
Faster world loading
Clean & intuitive UI

No unnecessary bloat — just the mods that make Cobblemon better.

Join a community-driven Cobblemon experience hosted by LemonCloud.

Compete with other trainers, trade to complete your Pokédex, and take part in server-wide events designed to keep the world alive and evolving.

Whether you're a casual collector or a competitive battler — your adventure starts here.

## 🍋 Join the Journey ## 
The ultimate optimised Cobblemon experience is ready.

🌀 Discord: https://discord.gg/lemoncloud

🌐 Website: https://lemoncloud.org

⚡ Cobblemon Official: https://cobblemon.com

See you in-game, Trainer!
